subject: feat(notifications): use Supabase Vault for notification secret auth
body:
Switch notify_new_message() trigger from app.settings to Vault for
reading the shared secret. ALTER DATABASE SET is not supported on
hosted Supabase. Vault secrets are managed via Dashboard UI.

Also: deploy Edge Function, add ONESIGNAL_APP_ID env var, update docs.

Tags: notifications, security, supabase, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: push-notifications
Semver: patch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
title: use Supabase Vault for notification secret auth
